test_cases.title: Daily report auto-generated on first session of the day
test_cases.description: Verify that checkAndRunDailyAnalysis generates a Markdown report when none exists for today
steps: Verify pending.json contains suggestions from the report

test_cases.title: Daily report skipped when already generated today
test_cases.description: Verify that checkAndRunDailyAnalysis is a no-op when today's report already exists
steps: Verify no analyzer process was spawned
Verify the report file was not modified

test_cases.title: Empty/truncated report file triggers regeneration
test_cases.description: Verify that a 0-byte report file is treated as non-existent and triggers regeneration
steps: Create daily-reports/YYYY-MM-DD.md as an empty file (0 bytes)
Verify the report is regenerated with actual content

test_cases.title: Report contains all required sections
test_cases.description: Verify the generated Markdown report has 数据概览, 异常信号, 趋势变化, 改进建议 sections
steps: Generate a report with non-zero session data
Verify all 4 required sections exist (## 数据概览, ## 异常信号, ## 趋势变化, ## 改进建议)
Verify effect review section is omitted when no apply history exists

test_cases.title: Report with 0 sessions shows no-data indicators
test_cases.description: Verify that a 0-session day generates a valid report with 无数据 indicators
steps: Verify output contains '无数据' or equivalent indicators
Verify no NaN or undefined values appear

test_cases.title: Report with 0 suggestions shows positive message
test_cases.description: Verify that 0 suggestions produces '系统运行良好，无需调整' message
steps: Run generateDailyReport with empty suggestions array
Verify 改进建议 section contains the positive message

test_cases.title: GC removes daily reports older than 30 days
test_cases.description: Verify runGc deletes .md files older than 30 days in daily-reports/
steps: Verify old file deleted, today's file preserved

test_cases.title: Lock prevents concurrent pipeline execution
test_cases.description: Verify that acquireLock returns false when another process holds the lock

test_cases.title: Stale lock is cleaned and acquired
test_cases.description: Verify that a lock with a dead PID is cleaned up and a new lock is acquired
steps: Verify lock file now contains current PID

test_cases.title: Pipeline failure saves error status and does not block
test_cases.description: Verify that a pipeline error writes .last-run-status with failed status
steps: Ensure analyzer script path is invalid

test_cases.title: /evolve-report shows today's report
test_cases.description: Verify handleEvolveReport with empty args returns today's report
steps: Verify result.content contains the Markdown content

test_cases.title: /evolve-report YYYY-MM-DD shows specific report
test_cases.description: Verify handleEvolveReport with date arg returns that date's report
steps: Verify result.content contains that file's content

test_cases.title: /evolve-report --list lists available reports
test_cases.description: Verify handleEvolveReport with --list returns report list with health info
steps: Verify output contains date list, last run status, today indicator

test_cases.title: /evolve-report for missing date returns error message
test_cases.description: Verify handleEvolveReport with non-existent date returns appropriate error
steps: Verify result contains '报告不存在' message

test_cases.title: mergePending deduplicates by title
test_cases.description: Verify that mergePending skips suggestions with same title as existing pending ones
steps: Create pending.json with one pending suggestion (title: 'Fix X')
Call mergePending with new suggestions including title: 'Fix X'
Verify only one suggestion with title 'Fix X' exists in pending.json

test_cases.title: mergePending caps at 30 pending suggestions
test_cases.description: Verify that exceeding 30 pending suggestions auto-evicts oldest
steps: Verify 2 oldest suggestions are marked as rejected with auto-evict reason

test_cases.title: Existing /evolve command still works after daily report changes
TypeScript compilation passes
test_cases.description: Verify npx tsc --noEmit passes with all changes

test_cases.title: ESLint passes
test_cases.description: Verify npm run lint shows 0 errors
steps: Run cd xyz-pi-extensions && npm run lint
